description: Top-level Commonality verifier dashboard AND report in one node: is this ready to deploy? Rolls up the four concern facets (functionality, docs, product, security) plus verifier-health into one deterministic gating status (any facet red makes root red), and writes the human-readable milestone-framed 'so where are we, really?' narrative to a report.md artifact (press `o` in verifier-tree to read it). The narrative is memoized internally — recomputed only when child statuses or the milestone change — and never affects the rollup status. Drill into the red children for per-check detail.
